title: thelypodium eucosmum
intro: Thelypodium eucosmum, also known as the slender whitetop or eucosmum, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Thelypodium eucosmum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Thelypodium eucosmum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
